name: Salesflare CRM API
what_it_does: Salesflare REST API for intelligent CRM for small B2B businesses. Enables AI agents to manage contacts and accounts, track opportunities and tasks, access email and meeting activity, retrieve pipeline analytics, and integrate Salesflare into sales automation workflows. Salesflare automatically enriches CRM data from email, meetings, and social profiles.
use_cases: Managing contacts and accounts from sales automation agents
Tracking pipeline opportunities and deal stages from revenue analytics agents
Retrieving email and meeting activity data from productivity integration agents
Integrating Salesflare CRM data into marketing automation workflow agents
not_for: Large enterprise CRM needs (Salesflare targets startups and SMB)
B2C sales without B2B relationship management
best_when: A startup or small B2B team using Salesflare wants AI agents to enrich contacts, track deals, and automate CRM data entry from email and calendar activity.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Contact and sales activity data requires GDPR compliance. Salesflare auto-enrichment from LinkedIn and email raises data governance considerations.

auth.notes: Salesflare API uses API key as Bearer token in Authorization header. API key available in Salesflare account settings.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial available; no permanent free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Growth, Pro, and Enterprise plans; pricing per user per month
pricing.notes: Belgian company. Developer-friendly pricing. API access on all paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Contact enrichment from email/LinkedIn raises data governance considerations
No public MCP server — REST API with Bearer token auth
Belgian company — GDPR native, EU-only data residency
Salesflare's automatic enrichment may conflict with agent-managed data if both run simultaneously
API documentation is good for an SMB CRM but less comprehensive than enterprise CRMs
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer CRM and enriched contact data. GDPR native (Belgian company). SOC2. Bearer token auth. EU-only data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enriched contact and CRM data. GDPR native (Belgian). SOC2. Bearer token. EU-only data residency.
